narrative:
Precinct Madison I (precinct in Jackson County) has 449 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
